/CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/3000ADM/X:ADMITS VIOLATION #1 AND #2/3000REIN/PAJ: 100 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIMELOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS   VIOLATION/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 22 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TOTHE ALLEGATIONS/X: BAIL IS SET ON PAROLE ARRAIGNMENT/NB/ /X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: TIME IS WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CONTD: PRE HEARING  CONFERENCE/   /TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAILPSY/4011,6/REP:1-26-21/S/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND PAROLE PHC
/CAL: PAROLE PRE HEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/ /X: PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN APPEARING/CONT/DOPC/
